hyperedges.description: A scene depicting an agricultural consultant and a farmer/client standing together in a crop field, examining a plant sample while a tractor operates in the background. Communicates expertise, trust, and hands-on field advisory services.

nodes.label: code_1.svg
nodes.notes: SVG vector graphic, 400x495.64px, generated with Adobe Illustrator 30.3.0

nodes.label: Double Slash Icon
nodes.notes: Two white diagonal slash shapes (path elements) forming a '//' symbol

nodes.label: Code Comment Symbol
nodes.notes: The '//' double-slash is universally recognized as the code comment syntax in languages like JavaScript, C, C++, Java, etc.

nodes.label: Programming / Coding Icon
nodes.notes: Icon used to represent software development, coding, or technical services

nodes.label: White Fill (#fff)
nodes.notes: Both path shapes use fill #ffffff (white), implying display on a dark or colored background

nodes.label: Adobe Illustrator 30.3.0
nodes.notes: Tool used to create and export this SVG (generator comment in file header)

nodes.label: Weather Icon SVG (Sun)
nodes.description: SVG icon depicting a sun with rays. Contains a circular sun shape centered at ~(49.66, 52.09) with 8 directional rays (top, bottom, left, right, and 4 diagonal). Includes a shadow/duplicate layer ('Gruppe_7') with 30% opacity for a soft depth effect. Stroke color is #263b4f (dark navy), stroke-width 5px, round linecap/linejoin, no fill. The viewBox is 0 0 100 100. Named 'dummy_wetter' (German: dummy weather), indicating it is a placeholder weather icon for a website.

nodes.label: Sun Weather Concept
nodes.description: The icon visually represents sunny/clear weather. The sun circle and 8 rays (cardinal and diagonal directions) are a standard universal symbol for sunshine and fair weather.

nodes.label: Dummy/Placeholder Asset
nodes.description: The filename prefix 'dummy_wetter' (German: dummy weather) indicates this SVG is a placeholder asset used during development or design mockups for a weather-related UI section on the website.

nodes.label: code_2.svg Graphic
nodes.description: SVG graphic composed of five white angled parallelogram/diagonal stripe shapes arranged in a stacked, cascading pattern. Likely a decorative brand mark or logo visual element.

nodes.label: Parallelogram Shape
nodes.description: Repeating white parallelogram/diagonal stripe path element used as a building block in the SVG composition.

nodes.label: Logo Mark / Brand Visual
nodes.description: The overall composition of angled shapes functions as a logo mark or decorative brand identity graphic, created with Adobe Illustrator.

nodes.label: Adobe Illustrator (Generator)
nodes.description: The SVG was generated by Adobe Illustrator 30.3.0, indicating professional vector graphic authoring.

nodes.label: SVG Graphic: code_3
nodes.description: Abstract SVG graphic composed of green parallelogram-shaped bars arranged in a wide horizontal banner layout, resembling a stylized barcode or decorative stripe motif.

nodes.label: Brand Color: Green #649f1f
nodes.description: The sole fill color used in the SVG, a mid-tone green (#649f1f), applied to all path elements via CSS class st0.

nodes.label: Visual Motif: Stylized Barcode / Vertical Stripes
nodes.description: The visual pattern in the SVG consists of parallelogram bars of varying heights arranged along a horizontal axis, evoking a barcode or abstract stripe pattern used as a decorative design element.
nodes.norm_label: visual motif: stylized barcode / vertical stripes

nodes.label: UI Element: Decorative Banner Graphic
nodes.description: Used as a decorative visual element in the meine-beratung website, likely as a header, footer, or section divider graphic.

nodes.label: Tool: Adobe Illustrator 30.3.0
nodes.description: The SVG was generated using Adobe Illustrator 30.3.0 with the SVG Export Plug-In version 2.1.3 Build 182.

nodes.label: Bonus Icon SVG
nodes.description: SVG icon depicting a hexagonal badge with gradient fill (pink-to-red), containing the text 'BONUS' and the number '80'. Used as a visual icon for a bonus or reward concept.

nodes.label: Hexagon Shape
nodes.description: The outer hexagonal polygon shape forming the badge background of the bonus icon.

nodes.label: Pink-Red Linear Gradient Fill
nodes.description: Linear gradient from #e94772 (pink) to #df015e (deep red/magenta) used as the fill for the hexagon background.

nodes.label: Number 80
nodes.description: Large white '80' numeral rendered in the center of the icon, likely representing a bonus score, percentage, or reward value.

nodes.label: BONUS Label Text
nodes.description: White 'BONUS' text rendered at the top of the icon, identifying the concept as a bonus or reward indicator.

nodes.label: Bonus / Reward Concept
nodes.description: Abstract concept of a bonus or reward, visually communicated by the badge design, the word 'BONUS', and the numeric value '80'.

nodes.label: Adobe Illustrator (Authoring Tool)
nodes.description: Adobe Illustrator 30.3.0 was used to generate this SVG via its SVG Export Plug-In (version 2.1.3 Build 182).

nodes.label: Premeo Bonuspunkte SVG Asset
nodes.description: SVG logo/badge for the Premeo bonus points program. Depicts the word 'BONUS' rendered in pink-red (#FF3162) letter paths inside a hexagonal outline frame, also in pink-red. Created with Adobe Illustrator 27.8.0. ViewBox 1000x1000.

nodes.label: Premeo Brand
nodes.description: Brand identity for 'Premeo', a bonus points / loyalty program. Brand color is #FF3162 (vivid pink-red). Uses a hexagon as the primary brand shape.

nodes.label: Bonus Points Program (Bonuspunkte)
nodes.description: A loyalty / bonus points program named Premeo. The SVG badge is likely used as a marketing or UI element to indicate that a product or service participates in or rewards Premeo Bonuspunkte.

nodes.label: Hexagon Badge Shape
nodes.description: The visual badge is a hexagon (six-sided polygon) outline (stroke #FF3162, stroke-width 43.4). The hexagon encloses the 'BONUS' typography. Hexagon is a common shape for badge/award iconography.

nodes.label: BONUS Typography
nodes.description: The letters B, O, N, U, S are rendered as vector paths (Pfad_662 through Pfad_665 plus additional path) in fill color #FF3162, positioned centrally within the hexagon frame.

nodes.label: Bayer Corporate Logo (Bayer Cross)
nodes.description: Official Bayer Cross SVG logo for on-screen RGB use. Generated with Adobe Illustrator 22.0.1. ViewBox 289.1x289.1. Contains the iconic Bayer Cross symbol with corporate brand colors: dark navy (#10384F), lime green (#89D329), and cyan blue (#00BCFF). Layers include a non-printing background and the Bayer Cross group with multiple text/glyph paths spelling BAYER and forming the circular cross emblem.

nodes.label: Bayer Brand Identity
nodes.description: Corporate brand identity concept represented by the Bayer Cross logo. The Bayer Cross is one of the most recognizable corporate logos in the world, representing Bayer AG, a German multinational pharmaceutical and life sciences company.

nodes.label: React Logo SVG
nodes.description: SVG asset containing the React framework logo, using the iconify--logos icon set. Rendered in React brand cyan color (#00D8FF), depicting the characteristic atomic orbital symbol.

nodes.label: React Framework
nodes.description: JavaScript frontend UI library developed by Meta. The project uses React as its primary frontend framework, as evidenced by the presence of the React logo asset.

nodes.label: React Brand Color #00D8FF
nodes.description: The official React brand cyan color (#00D8FF) used in the logo SVG fill. Part of the React visual identity.

nodes.label: Iconify Logos Icon Set
nodes.description: The SVG uses the iconify--logos CSS class, indicating it originates from the Iconify icon library's logos collection, a common source of brand/framework logos for web projects.

nodes.label: React Atomic Orbital Symbol
nodes.description: The React logo depicts an atom with three elliptical orbits and a nucleus, symbolizing the component-based, modular architecture of the React library. The nucleus corresponds to the central circle at viewBox coordinates (128, 113.668).

nodes.label: SVG Static Asset
nodes.description: Static SVG file placed in src/assets/, the standard Vite/React project directory for static assets imported directly by components. Width 35.93px, height 32px, viewBox 256x228.

nodes.label: Image
nodes.description: Close-up macro photograph of a corn (maize) leaf covered with water droplets and raindrops. The background shows a blurred corn field and an overcast grey sky with faint rain streaks, conveying rainy and wet weather conditions. Used as a background image for a weather ('Wetter') section.

nodes.label: CornLeaf
nodes.description: Foreground subject: a single broad corn (maize) leaf in sharp focus, covered with water droplets.

nodes.label: Rain
nodes.description: Visible rain streaks in the image and water droplets on the corn leaf indicate active rainfall.

nodes.label: CornField
nodes.description: Background of the image: a blurred corn field with multiple corn plants visible.

nodes.label: OvercastSky
nodes.description: Grey overcast sky visible in the upper portion of the background, reinforcing the rainy weather atmosphere.

nodes.label: Flufenacet Ban
nodes.description: Guiding principle / policy image representing the ban of the herbicide Flufenacet in agricultural contexts

nodes.label: Herbicide Application

nodes.label: Tractor with Boom Sprayer
nodes.description: An orange/red tractor (appears to be a Steyr brand) equipped with a wide boom sprayer, actively spraying chemicals on a field

nodes.label: Agricultural Field
nodes.description: Large green agricultural field (likely winter wheat or similar cereal crop) where herbicide is being applied

nodes.label: Wildlife / Deer in Field
nodes.description: Several deer (Rehe/roe deer) visible in the background of the field, symbolising wildlife exposure to herbicide spraying and the ecological impact of pesticide use

nodes.label: Flufenacet (Herbicide)
nodes.description: Flufenacet is a pre-emergence herbicide widely used in cereal farming to control grass weeds; the image contextualises its use and the policy debate around its prohibition

nodes.label: Pesticide Regulation / Policy
nodes.description: Regulatory and policy dimension of banning or restricting herbicide use in agriculture, relevant to EU plant protection product legislation

nodes.label: Environmental Impact of Herbicide Use
nodes.description: The ecological consequences of herbicide application on biodiversity, soil health, and wildlife — visually represented by the deer present near the spraying tractor

nodes.label: Sustainable Agriculture
nodes.description: Overarching guiding principle (Leitbild) for transitioning agriculture away from harmful herbicides towards more sustainable farming practices

nodes.label: Person
nodes.description: Professional headshot portrait of a middle-aged man with short light brown hair and blue eyes, wearing a white shirt or jacket with a Bayer company logo. Friendly smile, photographed against a neutral gray background. Typical corporate/advisory professional portrait style.

nodes.label: HeroImage
nodes.description: Website header/hero image showing two people (a man and a woman) standing in a lush green agricultural field. The man is holding up a plant sample and pointing, while the woman looks on. In the background, a green tractor (appears to be a Fendt) is visible operating in the field, likely spraying crops. The setting is a large open farmland under bright daylight. A decorative quotation mark graphic overlay appears on the right side of the image. The image evokes themes of agricultural consulting, crop advisory, field inspection, and farming expertise.

nodes.label: AgriculturalField
nodes.description: Lush green crop field, likely sugar beet or similar broadleaf crop, extending into the background. Flat, open landscape typical of Northern European farmland.

nodes.label: Tractor
nodes.description: Green tractor (Fendt brand) visible in the background of the field, appearing to be equipped with a sprayer or field equipment. Represents active farm operations.

nodes.label: AgriculturalConsultant
nodes.description: A man in a checkered shirt and dark jacket holding up a plant sample and pointing toward the field, apparently explaining or advising. Represents an agricultural consultant or agronomist role.

nodes.label: FarmerOrClient
nodes.description: A woman in a white shirt and dark jacket standing next to the consultant, listening and observing. Represents a farmer, landowner, or client receiving field consultation.

nodes.label: PlantSample
nodes.description: A green plant (likely a broadleaf crop such as sugar beet or rapeseed) held up by the consultant for examination. Symbolizes crop inspection and agronomic analysis.

nodes.label: HeroImage
nodes.description: Header/hero image showing two people (a man and a woman) standing in a lush green agricultural field, examining a plant cutting together. A green tractor is visible in the background, operating on the field. The scene conveys agricultural consulting or advisory work in a farming context.

Shows a young man with short brown hair and a beard wearing a red plaid flannel shirt, looking down at a smartphone with a slight smile. In the background is a large agricultural tractor (green/yellow, consistent with brands like Claas or John Deere), slightly out of focus. Warm golden-hour lighting. The overall mood is modern, approachable, and agricultural — fitting for a farming or agri-business loyalty/consulting program.

nodes.label: Maiszüchtung – Maisspitzen (Photograph)
nodes.description: Low-angle photograph of a maize/corn (Zea mays) field taken at golden hour with warm backlighting. Plants are at an early vegetative growth stage (approx. V6–V8, 6–8 leaf stage). Long, narrow, bright green leaves point upward; the leaf tips (Maisspitzen) are prominently visible. Faint tassel precursors are discernible at the tops of the most advanced plants. The crop stand is dense and uniform, consistent with a plant breeding or certified seed production field. A forested hillside is visible in the background.

nodes.label: Maize / Corn (Zea mays)
nodes.description: The crop species depicted: maize (Zea mays), a major cereal crop. Shown at early vegetative stage with characteristic rolled/arching leaves.

nodes.label: Vegetative Growth Stage V6–V8
nodes.description: The plants appear to be at approximately the V6–V8 leaf stage of maize development. No ears or fully formed tassels are visible; small tassel precursors are faintly discernible at the shoot apex of advanced plants.

nodes.label: Maisspitzen (Maize Leaf Tips)
nodes.description: The pointed leaf tips of young maize plants — 'Maisspitzen' — are the visual focus of the image. They are elongated, bright green, and oriented upward, backlit by strong sunlight.

nodes.label: Maize Field / Breeding Plot
nodes.description: A dense, uniform stand of maize plants in an outdoor field, with a forested hillside visible in the background. The uniformity of the stand suggests a plant breeding trial or seed production field (Maiszüchtung = maize breeding).

nodes.label: Golden Hour Backlighting
nodes.description: The photograph is taken with strong warm backlighting consistent with golden hour (sunrise or sunset). The light accentuates the translucency and bright green color of the maize leaves and creates a visually striking agricultural scene.

nodes.label: Portrait Photo
nodes.description: Professional headshot of a young man (late 20s to mid-30s) with short brown hair, neatly trimmed beard, and blue eyes. He is smiling warmly at the camera and wearing a white polo/collared shirt with a Bayer logo badge on the chest. Background is a neutral grey gradient. High-quality professional portrait photography with soft, even lighting.

nodes.label: Podcast Episode 2 Thumbnail
nodes.description: Outdoor podcast recording thumbnail showing two people standing in a grain field (wheat/barley). A woman in a white shirt and jeans on the left, and a man in a black t-shirt wearing headphones and carrying an OSCA-branded recording device on the right. A field trial marker sign reading 'UK' is visible in the background.

nodes.label: Agriculture / Grain Field Topic
nodes.description: The podcast episode is set in a grain field (wheat or barley), indicating an agricultural topic, likely related to crop consulting, agronomy, or field trials.

nodes.label: Field Trial Marker 'UK'
nodes.description: A field trial sign labeled 'UK' visible in the background, suggesting a variety trial or experimental plot designation in the grain field.

nodes.label: Podcast Host (Male, Headphones, OSCA Recorder)

nodes.label: Podcast Guest (Female, White Shirt)

nodes.description: A blue OSCA-branded portable audio recording bag/device used for the outdoor field podcast recording.

nodes.label: Outdoor Field Podcast Recording
nodes.description: The podcast episode is recorded outdoors in an agricultural field during summer (sunny day, mature grain crop), emphasizing hands-on, on-location content style.

nodes.label: Corn Field
nodes.description: Wide panoramic photograph of a young corn (maize) field with seedlings growing in neat parallel rows converging into the distance. Dark moist soil between rows. Background features a tree line and a soft pink/orange sky indicating golden hour (sunrise or sunset) lighting.

nodes.label: Agricultural Landscape
nodes.description: Broad open agricultural landscape visible in the header image, suggesting themes of farming, nature, growth, and rural scenery.

nodes.label: Golden Hour Sky
nodes.description: Soft pink and orange sky at golden hour (sunrise or sunset) visible at the top of the header image, giving a warm, optimistic tone to the scene.

nodes.label: Tree Line / Forest Edge
nodes.description: Dense tree line forming the horizon background behind the corn field, adding depth and a natural boundary to the landscape.

nodes.label: huSAR Plus Herbicide
nodes.description: Bayer huSAR Plus herbicide product, 3-liter container. Used for weed control in cereal/grain crops. Labeled as 'Herbizid' (German for herbicide).

nodes.label: Bayer
nodes.description: Bayer AG — multinational pharmaceutical and life sciences company, manufacturer of huSAR Plus herbicide.

nodes.label: Herbicide
nodes.description: A type of agricultural chemical (pesticide) used to control or kill unwanted plants (weeds) in crop fields.

nodes.label: Agrochemical
nodes.description: Chemical products used in agriculture, including pesticides, herbicides, and fertilizers.

nodes.label: Grain Crop Protection
nodes.description: Application domain for huSAR Plus — protecting cereal/grain crops such as wheat or barley from weed competition.

nodes.label: BCS Kartoffelbestand (Potato Field)
nodes.description: Aerial ground-level photograph of a Bayer CropScience potato field (Kartoffelbestand). Shows parallel rows of healthy mid-season potato plants with broad dark-green leaves and dense canopy cover, growing in ridged sandy/loamy soil furrows. Flat agricultural landscape with trees visible on the horizon under an overcast sky.

nodes.label: Potato Plant (Solanum tuberosum)
nodes.description: Healthy mid-season potato plants with broad, dark green leaves and good canopy coverage, growing in ridged rows.

nodes.label: Agricultural Field / Potato Crop
nodes.description: A flat, open agricultural field with ridged planting rows, sandy/loamy soil, situated in a flat landscape typical of Northern European potato-growing regions.

nodes.label: Bayer CropScience
nodes.description: Bayer CropScience — agricultural division of Bayer AG, provider of crop protection products, seeds, and digital farming solutions. Image is used as a client reference/visual asset.

nodes.label: Corn Cob (Maize)
nodes.description: Close-up professional photograph of a maize (corn) cob with husk partially pulled back, revealing plump golden-yellow kernels arranged in rows. Bright green husk leaves frame the cob. Dramatic lighting against a dark background.

nodes.label: Maize Kernel

nodes.label: Maize Husk (Leaf Sheaths)

nodes.label: Isometric Stacked Layers (Hero Image)
nodes.description: Hero image showing two rounded rectangular slab shapes in isometric/3D perspective. The top slab is outlined in light grey with a nearly transparent/white fill. The bottom slab is filled with a rich purple/violet gradient with a glossy, layered appearance. The visual concept represents stacked layers or platforms, communicating depth, structure, modularity, and a solid foundation — suitable for a consulting or professional services landing page.
nodes.concept: stacked layers, modular structure, solid foundation, layered expertise

links.notes: White fill suggests icon is intended for use on a dark/colored background, typical of UI hero icons or section decorations

hyperedges.label: FieldConsultationScene
hyperedges.description: A scene depicting an agricultural consultant and a farmer/client standing together in a crop field, examining a plant sample while a tractor operates in the background. Communicates expertise, trust, and hands-on field advisory services.
